---
title: "FLEEK: Fact Verification with LLMs and Knowledge Graphs"
description: "Our EMNLP 2023 demo — automatically extracting claims, gathering evidence from KGs and the web, and suggesting corrections for factual errors."
author: "synesis"
date: "2023-11-02"
categories: [AI, LLMs, NLP, knowledge graphs, hallucination, conference, paper, generative AI, links, video]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Figure from [the FLEEK paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.17119).](cover.jpg)

![Figure from [the FLEEK paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.17119).](screenshot2.jpg)

![Figure from [the FLEEK paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.17119).](screenshot3.jpg)

Check out our paper for EMNLP 2023 demo track: verifying facts described in texts with LLMs and evidence retrieved from web and knowledge graphs!

Farima Fatahi Bayat, Kun Qian, Benjamin Han, Yisi Sang, Anton Belyi, Samira Khorshidi, Ph.D., Fei Wu, Ihab Ilyas, and Yunyao Li. 2023. FLEEK: Factual Error Detection and Correction with Evidence Retrieved from External Knowledge. [[1]](#ref-1)

> Abstract: Detecting factual errors in textual information, whether generated by large language models (LLM) or curated by humans, is crucial for making informed decisions. LLMs' inability to attribute their claims to external knowledge and their tendency to hallucinate makes it difficult to rely on their responses. Humans, too, are prone to factual errors in their writing. Since manual detection and correction of factual errors is labor-intensive, developing an automatic approach can greatly reduce human effort. We present FLEEK, a prototype tool that automatically extracts factual claims from text, gathers evidence from external knowledge sources, evaluates the factuality of each claim, and suggests revisions for identified errors using the collected evidence. Initial empirical evaluation on fact error detection (77-85% F1) shows the potential of FLEEK. A video demo of FLEEK can be found at [[2]](#ref-2).

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_emnlp2023-llms-knowledgegraphs-activity-7125640397988450306-WIlI).*

---

## References

<a id="ref-1"></a>[1] Farima Fatahi Bayat et al. "FLEEK: Factual Error Detection and Correction with Evidence Retrieved from External Knowledge." EMNLP 2023. <https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.17119>

![[Watch on YouTube](https://youtu.be/NapJFUlkPdQ)](video-NapJFUlkPdQ.jpg){fig-align="center"}

<a id="ref-2"></a>[2] FLEEK video demo. <https://youtu.be/NapJFUlkPdQ>
